MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Lothar & Linder Theilen
Linda Nusser of GORDON & REES LLP (415-986-5900), appearing for defendant / opposing party Mannington Mills, Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS LOTHAR & LINDA THEILEN'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL

Hearing held. The Court ruled as follows: Plaintiffs' motion for order granting preference is denied without prejudice. The Court set an expedited trial in 180 days, July 8, 2013 at 11:15am in Department 503. Parties agreed to last day for hearing summary motions is 14 days before trial. Plaintiffs have stipulated that summary motions may be brought on shortened notice. Summary motions may be brought on 14 days notice, without an additional two days for e-service, with oppositions due 7 court days before the hearing and replies due 3 court days before the hearing. Plaintiffs to make a settlement demand on all defendants 2 weeks from MSC. Settlement conference in room 603 at 1:30pm on May 16, 2013. Expert Disclosure due 50days before trial. Pare down list due 30 days before trial. Fact discovery cut-off date is 2 weeks before trial. Expert discovery remains open until 7/8. The parties to meet and confer regarding any other scheduling or other issue which any of them want to have included in the preference order. Any discovery disputes should be handled by informal hearings with the Court before scheduling any formal hearings. Discovery hearings can be heard up to 2 weeks before trial. Further case management conference on June 5, 2013 at 1:30pm in Department 503. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on June 24, 2013 at 1:30 pm in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by June 21 at 12noon. Counsel for plaintiffs to prepare an order and forward to Berry & Berry for approval as to form. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
